# Charlie Hulcher

> Engineering Leader and AI Researcher focused on building tech startup teams and exploring advanced AI applications.

## About
- [Home](https://charlie.engineer/): Personal site — essays, notes, and project writeups
- [Archive](https://charlie.engineer/archive/): All posts by date
- [RSS Feed](https://charlie.engineer/index.xml): Full RSS feed

## Sections
- [Posts](https://charlie.engineer/posts/): All posts
- [Essays](https://charlie.engineer/essays/): Long-form writing
- [Notes](https://charlie.engineer/notes/): Short build logs and observations
- [Links](https://charlie.engineer/links/): Curated external links with commentary

## Writing
- [Agent Standards Are Converging](https://charlie.engineer/posts/agent-standards-are-converging/): Why the agent boom is making protocol standards matter more, not less.
- [Inference Is a Supply Chain](https://charlie.engineer/links/inference-is-a-supply-chain/): If your product needs GPUs to work, inference supply is not just a pricing problem.
- [Asymmetric Autonomy](https://charlie.engineer/links/asymmetric-autonomy/): The Amazon outage was not an AI problem. It was an asymmetric autonomy problem.
- [The Retrieval Paradox: Why Your Most Productive AI Tool Is Also Your Biggest Security Risk](https://charlie.engineer/posts/enterprise-retrieval-strategy/): 
- [Deep Retrieval: Organizational Understanding for AI Agents](https://charlie.engineer/posts/deep-retrieval/): I built a self-hosted retrieval system that lets AI agents produce comprehensive reports across an entire organization's history in about 7 minutes.
- [agentctl: Headless Orchestration for Coding Agents](https://charlie.engineer/posts/agentctl/): A CLI that wraps coding agents for headless orchestration and multi-adapter supervision across Claude Code, Codex, and Gemini.
- [OrgLoop: Organization as Code for Autonomous AI Organizations](https://charlie.engineer/posts/orgloop-organization-as-code/): OrgLoop is an open-source runtime that wires AI agents together with declarative event routing.
- [Coding is Creative](https://charlie.engineer/essays/coding-is-creative/): Programming as a creative outlet can be understood by comparing it to traditional artistic pursuit.
- [Grand Prize at LA Hacks - Virtual Reality Treadmill](https://charlie.engineer/posts/la-hacks-tred/): From 2014 - winning the largest hackathon in history.
- [Autonomous Hovercraft](https://charlie.engineer/posts/autonomous-hovercraft/): From 2012 - Clark School of Engineering winning autonomous hovercraft.
